task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the initial Keplerian state from the baseline file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/interstellar_oberth_baseline.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the GMAT simulation is set to a Sun-centered coordinate system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing the spacecraft's coordinate system set to SunMJ2000Eq or a custom Sun-centered frame.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured a prograde impulsive burn in the VNB frame at solar periapsis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing an ImpulsiveBurn configured with VNB axes, and a Mission Sequence that propagates to Periapsis before applying the burn.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set up a Targeter to achieve the specific C3Energy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing a Target sequence with an Achieve command targeting a C3Energy (or equivalent orbital energy metric) of exactly 1500.0 km^2/s^2.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting GMAT script was saved to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or GMAT save dialog showing a file named 'oberth_maneuver.script' saved in the '~/GMAT_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the required maneuver parameters were recorded to a file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file open in an editor or terminal (in ~/GMAT or ~/GMAT_output) containing the recorded Delta V magnitude (between 4.80 and 4.95 km/s), inertial velocity (between 191.5 and 193.0 km/s), and final C3 (around 1500.0).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually ran the GMAT simulation to obtain the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: GMAT message window showing successful run/convergence messages, or an active GMAT output plot/report, indicating the software was executed.

integrity.description: Verify the saved script is a genuine GMAT script and not a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of oberth_maneuver.script (if visible) contain valid GMAT syntax (e.g., 'Create Spacecraft', 'Create ImpulsiveBurn') rather than just plain text answers.

integrity.description: Verify the recorded results match the simulation outputs rather than being guessed or calculated externally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values recorded in the final text file should correspond to the values visible in the GMAT output reports, command summary, or message window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Delta-V magnitude is approximately 4.88 km/s (acceptable range: 4.80 - 4.95 km/s). The correct inertial velocity immediately after the burn is approximately 192.31 km/s (acceptable range: 191.5 - 193.0 km/s). The final C3 must be exactly 1500.0 km^2/s^2 (acceptable range: 1499.0 - 1501.0).
